title: Playing card dealing shoe
abstract: A playing card shoe including an elongated body having a card cradle for supporting a plurality of playing cards. The card cradle has an outlet opening adjacent to a front end of the elongated body through which playing cards can be removed. A card alignment portion is integrated into an outside surface of the elongated body, where the card alignment portion is used to square up, align, a stack of playing cards for insertion into the card cradle. The card alignment portion can include an indented portion and a flat rear surface substantially perpendicular to the outside surface of the elongated body. The stack of playing cards is positioned in the indented portion, with a bottom of the stack of playing cards abutting the flat rear surface of the cards alignment portion.
claims: Claims What is claimed is: 1. A playing card shoe, comprising: an elongated body including a card cradle for supporting a plurality of playing cards, the card cradle having an outlet opening adjacent to a front end of the elongated body; and a card alignment portion integrated into an outside surface of the elongated body. 2. A playing card shoe as set forth in claim 1 , wherein the card alignment portion Includes an indented portion and a flat rear surface substantially perpendicular to the outside surface of the elongated body, 3. A playing card shoe as set forth in claim 1, wherein the card alignment portion includes a cut card gauge. 4. A playing card shoe as set forth in claim 1 , further comprising a cut card gauge. 5. A playing card shoe as set forth in claim 4, wherein the cut card gauge is integrated into the card alignment portion. 6. A playing card shoe as set forth in claim 5, wherein the cut card gauge is integrated on a top edge on an inner surface of the card cradle. 7. A playing card shoe as set forth in claim 5, wherein the cut card gauge is an adjustable cut card gauge. 8. A playing cards shoe as set forth in claim 7, wherein the adjustable cut card gauge is positioned on the outside surface of the elongated body. 9. A. playing card shoe as set forth in claim 7, wherein the adjustable cut card gauge is integrated in a top edges on an inner surface of the card cradle, 10. A playing card shoe, comprising: an elongated body including a card cradle for supporting a plurality of playing cards, the card cradle having an outlet opening adjacent to a front end of the elongated body: and a cut card gauge, 1 1. A playing card shoe as set forth in claim 0, wherein the cut card gauge is integrated into an outside surface of the elongated body. 12. A playing card shoe as set forth in claim 10, wherein the cut card gauge is integrated on a top edge on an inner surface of the card cradle. 13. A playing card shoe as set forth in claim 10, wherein the cut card gauge is an adjustable cut card gauge. 14. A playing cards shoe as set forth in claim 13, wherein the adjustable cut card gauge is positioned on the outside surface of the elongated body. 15. A playing card shoe as set forth in claim 13, wherein the adjustable cut card gang is integrated in top edge on an inner surface of the card cradle. 16. A playing card shoe, comprising: an elongated body having a card cradle for supporting a plurality of playing cards, the card cradle having an outlet opening adjacent to a front end of the elongated body; the outlet open defines a gap through which the playing cards are removed from the playing card shoe, wherein a width of the gap is adjustable. 17. A playing card shoe as set. forth in claim 16, further comprising a gap adjustment mechanism. 18. A playing card shoe as set forth in claim 17, wherein the gap adjustment mechanism include a movable wedge positioned beneath a bottom surface of the card cradle, 19, A playing card shoe as set forth in claim 1 8, wherein the moveable wedge is movable in a first direction to decrease the width of the gap and a second direction to increase the width of the gap.
